title: spiraea simplex
intro: Spiraea simplex, also known as hardhack or mountain spiraea, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Spiraea simplex can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
